title: Scene Description Task Annotation
description: Captioning task for describing the visual scene or environment. Supports both image and video raw types. Each item provides a question prompt, an answer caption, and optional reasoning.

version.description: Schema version - must be '3.0' for this schema

items.description: Array of scene description items, one per image or video

image_id.description: Reference to image ID (matches directory name in contextual/). Required when raw_type is image.

video_id.description: Reference to video ID (matches directory name in contextual/). Required when raw_type is video.

question.description: The captioning prompt or guidance for the scene description

metadata.description: File metadata for identification and cataloging

description.description: Human-readable description of this annotation file

license.description: License under which this annotation is distributed

tags.description: List of tags for categorization and search
